channel.title: Stock on xgDebug's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Stock on xgDebug's Blog

item.title: Well-known low-cost ETFs
item.description:
1. Vanguard Total Stock Market ETF (VTI):
    • Expense Ratio: Approximately 0.03%
  2. iShares Core S&P 500 ETF (IVV):
    • Expense Ratio: Approximately 0.03%
  3. Schwab U.S. Broad Market ETF (SCHB):
    • Expense Ratio: Approximately 0.03%
  4. SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (SPY):
    • Expense Ratio: Approximately 0.09%
  5. Invesco QQQ Trust (QQQ):
    • Expense Ratio: Approximately 0.20%
  6. iShares Russell 2000 ETF (IWM):
    • Expense Ratio: Approximately 0.19%
  7. Vanguard Total Bond Market ETF (BND):
    • Expense Ratio: Approximately 0.04%
  8. iShares Core U.S. Aggregate Bond ETF (AGG):
    • Expense Ratio: Approximately 0.04%
